workflow.name: alp-demo-rebalance
workflow.description: Operator-triggered force rebalance for demo recordings and on-call interventions. Manual trigger fires immediately when the dashboard's Run now button is pressed, hitting the keeper's /force?pool=<key> endpoint which bypasses anti-whipsaw cooldown and synthesizes an immediate rebalance Decision for the targeted pool. Used in the demo recording's scene 4 to land a fresh on-chain rebalance live in the agent feed during recording. Targets V3 USDC/USDT by default — the lowest-blast-radius stable-pair pool.
